get.summary: Provides export feed for service agreements
get.description: Provides export feed for service agreements

parameters.name: from
parameters.description:
Continuation token received from previous export request in "continueFrom" field.
When not specified, the export process starts from the beginning.\
Use custom date strings, e.g. "2020-01-01" to start the export process from the certain point in time.

parameters.name: includeRecentChanges
parameters.description:
Use "true" to start receiving the most recent changes quicker.
Note this may cause the same results appearing multiple times on consecutive requests.

400.description: The request cannot be processed, check validation errors or request format

get.summary: Gets a list of service agreements
get.description: Gets a list of service agreements

parameters.name: status
parameters.description:
Filters by service agreement status\
Values: [Draft, Sent, Rejected, Accepted, Activated, Canceled, Expired, AutoRenew]

parameters.name: createdBefore
parameters.description: Return items created before certain date/time (in UTC)

parameters.name: createdOnOrAfter
parameters.description: Return items created on or after certain date/time (in UTC)

parameters.name: modifiedBefore
parameters.description: Return items modified before certain date/time (in UTC)

parameters.name: modifiedOnOrAfter
parameters.description: Return items modified on or after certain date/time (in UTC)

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The logical number of page to return, starting from 1

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: How many records to return (50 by default)

parameters.name: includeTotal
parameters.description: Whether total count should be returned

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description:
Applies sorting by the specified field:\
"?sort=+FieldName" for ascending order,\
"?sort=-FieldName" for descending order.\
\
Available fields are: Id, Name, CreatedOn, ModifiedOn, StartDate, EndDate

400.description: The request cannot be processed, check validation errors or request format

get.summary: Gets service agreement specified by ID
get.description: Gets service agreement specified by ID

400.description: The request cannot be processed, check validation errors or request format

hasMore.description:
Indicates whether the export feed has reached its logical "end", or if there is more to export.
True means the consumer can invoke another request right away using new continuation token value.
False means there is now new data for the export, and the consumer should wait for some time (5-10 minutes)
before making another request.

continueFrom.description: Continuation token used to resume the export operation. The value should be used in "from" query parameter of the following request.

data.description: The collection of exported items, usually sorted chronologically based on modification date

createdOn.description: When the service agreement was created

createdById.description: ID of the user that created this agreement

modifiedOn.description: When the service agreement was last modified

modifiedById.description: ID of the user that modified this agreement

templateFields.description: Data fields that were populated from the template

businessUnitId.description: Business unit ID to which this agreement is assigned

locationIds.description: Location IDs covered by the agreement

origin.description: The method used to create the agreement

summary.description: Optional text summary of the agreement

importedDeferredAmount.description: Imported amount already billed for this agreement

importedRecognizedAmount.description: Imported amount of recognized revenue for this agreement

durationMonths.description: Duration of the agreement in months (can be absent when the agreement is still being built)

autoRenew.description: Determines if the agreement automatically renews or expires on its end date

renewalAgreementId.description: Indicates the next agreement ID that renews the current agreement (null means the agreement was not renewed)

startDate.description: The start date of the agreement (can be absent when the agreement is still being built)

endDate.description: The end date of the agreement (can be absent when the agreement is still being built)

billingSchedule.description: The billing schedule of the agreement (can be absent when the agreement is still being built)

paymentTermId.description: ID of the payment terms of the agreement (can be absent when the agreement is still being built)

paymentMethodId.description:
ID of the payment method of the agreement (can be absent when the agreement is still being built).
Note there is a special hardcoded value of -1 that means "Cash or Check".

estimatedTravelCost.description: The dollar amount of estimated travel cost for all visits (can be absent when the agreement is still being built)

estimatedLaborCost.description: The dollar amount of estimated labor cost for all visits (can be absent when the agreement is still being built)

estimatedMaterialCost.description: The dollar amount of estimated material cost for all visits (can be absent when the agreement is still being built)

laborMarkupPercentage.description: The markup percentage applied to labor cost of the agreement (can be absent when the agreement is still being built)

materialMarkupPercentage.description: The markup percentage applied to material cost of the agreement (can be absent when the agreement is still being built)

laborSurcharge.description: The dollar amount added to labor cost of the agreement

materialSurcharge.description: The dollar amount added to material cost of the agreement

totalAgreementPrice.description: The total price of the agreement (can be absent when the agreement is still being built)

estimatedGrossMarginAmount.description: The estimated gross margin in dollars for the agreement (can be absent when the agreement is still being built)

estimatedGrossMarginPercentage.description: The estimated gross margin as a percentage of the Total Agreement Price (can be absent when the agreement is still being built)

rateSheetId.description: ID of a rate sheet (Client-Specific Pricing Rule) assigned to the service agreement

accountManagerId.description: ID of the employee assigned to the agreement

soldById.description: ID of the employee or technician that sold this agreement

tagTypeIds.description:
Tag type IDs associated with this service agreement.
If this field is null, it means it was not requested to be loaded via the `IncludeTags` flag.

active.description: Whether this agreement still exists, or was deleted already.

originalTemplateId.description:
ID of the template originally used to create this service agreement.
Note that the content of the original template may have changed since the agreement's creation.
The template fields in this object represent the current state of the service agreement, as they were captured at the time of creation.

revenueRecognitionMode.description: Revenue recognition mode to be used for a new service agreement

generalLedgerAccountId.description:
General ledger account that will hold funds until recognition
(this is only used for the Deferred revenue recognition)

invoiceCancellationMode.description:
How to resolve the difference with the customer when service agreement is cancelled
(this is only used for the Deferred revenue recognition)

billingScheduleType.description: Defines when the customer is billed for the service agreement.

negativeLiabilityServiceId.description:
Negative liability services draw money from liability account when services are delivered
(this is only used for the Deferred revenue recognition)

positiveIncomeServiceId.description:
Positive income services transfer money into the income account when services are delivered
(this is only used for the Deferred revenue recognition)

defaultLaborCostPerHour.description: The default labor cost / hour to be used in the UI when adding service agreement visits

defaultExtraTravelCostPerHour.description: The default extra travel cost / hour to be used in the UI when adding service agreement locations

defaultPricingStrategy.description: The default pricing strategy to be used when creating a service agreement.

defaultTargetMarginValue.description: The default target margin value used in gross margin target strategies when creating a service agreement.

defaultTargetMarginValueType.description: The default target margin value type used in gross margin target strategies when creating a service agreement.

defaultFlatPrice.description: The default price used in flat pricing strategies when creating a service agreement.

defaultMarkupPercentage.description: The default percentage value used in markup and surcharge strategies when creating a service agreement

defaultSurcharge.description: The default surcharge amount used in markup and surcharge strategies when creating a service agreement

defaultLaborMarkupPercentage.description: The default percentage value of the labor markup to be used in the UI when creating a service agreement

defaultMaterialMarkupPercentage.description: The default percentage value of the material markup to be used in the UI when creating a service agreement

defaultLaborSurcharge.description: The default labor surcharge amount to be used in the UI when creating a service agreement

defaultMaterialSurcharge.description: The default material surcharge amount to be used in the UI when creating a service agreement

defaultRateSheetId.description: The default rate sheet ID (Client-Specific Pricing Rule) to be used in the UI when creating a service agreement

defaultCampaignId.description: The ID of the marketing campaign to be used by default when booking jobs for service agreement visits

defaultDocumentTemplateId.description: The ID of the document template to be used by default when creating service agreements

defaultAutoRenew.description: The default auto-renew setting when creating a service agreement

ServiceAgreements.PricingStrategyType.description: Defines how prices are calculated for service agreements or visits.

type.description: A URI reference that identifies the problem type

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem type

status.description: The HTTP status code generated by server

traceId.description: Internal trace ID for advanced diagnostics

errors.description: Provides more details about errors occurred, which can potentially be used for visual display

data.description: Provides additional data, intended for programmatical usage

ApiErrorResponse.description: Detailed error response, following RFC 7807 recommendations (https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7807).

page.description: From which page this output has started

pageSize.description: Page size for this query (i.e. how many records were requested to return)

hasMore.description: True if there are more records in the query than returned in this result

totalCount.description: Total count of records for this query (can optionally be populated)

data.description: The collection of result items, will never have more than PageSize items

createdOn.description: When the service agreement was created

createdById.description: ID of the user that created this agreement

modifiedOn.description: When the service agreement was last modified

modifiedById.description: ID of the user that modified this agreement

ID of the payment method of the agreement (can be absent when the agreement is still being built).
Note there is a special hardcoded value of -1 that means "Cash or Check".

estimatedTravelCost.description: The dollar amount of estimated travel cost for all visits (can be absent when the agreement is still being built)

estimatedLaborCost.description: The dollar amount of estimated labor cost for all visits (can be absent when the agreement is still being built)

estimatedMaterialCost.description: The dollar amount of estimated material cost for all visits (can be absent when the agreement is still being built)

laborMarkupPercentage.description: The markup percentage applied to labor cost of the agreement (can be absent when the agreement is still being built)

materialMarkupPercentage.description: The markup percentage applied to material cost of the agreement (can be absent when the agreement is still being built)

laborSurcharge.description: The dollar amount added to labor cost of the agreement

materialSurcharge.description: The dollar amount added to material cost of the agreement

estimatedGrossMarginAmount.description: The estimated gross margin in dollars for the agreement (can be absent when the agreement is still being built)

estimatedGrossMarginPercentage.description: The estimated gross margin as a percentage of the Total Agreement Price (can be absent when the agreement is still being built)

rateSheetId.description: ID of a rate sheet (Client-Specific Pricing Rule) assigned to the service agreement

accountManagerId.description: ID of the employee assigned to the agreement

Tag type IDs associated with this service agreement.
